---
mode: agent
---
Is this a beautiful app? Please provide a detailed analysis of its design, user experience, and overall aesthetic appeal. Consider the following aspects:
- Color scheme and visual hierarchy
- Typography and readability
- Layout and spacing
- Use of imagery and icons
- Consistency and coherence in design elements
- Responsiveness and adaptability to different screen sizes
- Overall user experience and ease of navigation
- Emotional impact and engagement
- Alignment with modern design trends and best practices
Please provide your analysis in a structured format, addressing each aspect clearly. If possible, include examples or references to specific design elements that contribute to the app's beauty or detract from it. Your feedback will be valuable for improving the app's design and user experience.

After this, think a plan to implement the feedback, focusing on actionable steps to enhance the app's beauty and user experience. Consider prioritizing changes based on their impact and feasibility. Save the plan as a file in a structured format, outlining the tasks, responsible team members, and estimated timelines for completion. Ensure that the plan is realistic and achievable within the app's development cycle.

After that proceed with the plan. Use the playwright mcp tool to check those things in the browser dom and console. Don't stop until the plan is fully executed and all tasks are completed. Document each step taken, including any challenges faced and how they were resolved. This will help in tracking progress and ensuring that the app meets the desired standards of beauty and user experience. 

Question everything you find and encounter during the audit process, and ensure that all design elements are thoroughly evaluated. If you find any inconsistencies or areas for improvement, make note of them and include them in the plan.

Finally, provide a summary of the changes made, highlighting the improvements in design and user experience. Include before-and-after comparisons where applicable, and gather feedback from users to validate the enhancements. This will ensure that the app not only looks beautiful but also provides a delightful user experience.

I challenge you to don't stop until the app is truly beautiful and meets the highest standards of design and user experience. Your dedication to this task will result in a polished, professional, and aesthetically pleasing application that users will love.
